name: QuestForge Ltd.
pitch: A secure subscription management platform for SaaS developers that flags anomalous trial patterns and automatically optimizes pricing tiers to cut churn.

active_quest.title: Forge Your First Landing Page
active_quest.description: Fulfill positioning, draft a page, and set up campaign outreach.

steps.title: Define Your Target Audience and Positioning
steps.description: Use the Strategist to scope target clients and shape the positioning of: 'A secure subscription management platform for SaaS developers that flags anomalous trial patterns and automatically optimizes pricing tiers to cut churn.'

artifact_data.target_audience: Freelance Web Designers and Small Agency Owners
artifact_data.core_problem: Struggle to estimate exact project time and pricing, leading to scope creep and unpaid overtime. Prompt source: A secure subscription management platform for SaaS developers that flags anomalous trial patterns and automatically optimizes pricing tiers to cut churn.
artifact_data.value_proposition: An interactive, metric-driven estimation dashboard that calculates recommended pricing based on historical task-level benchmarks.
artifact_data.primary_benefit: Bid for projects 2x faster and immediately eliminate unpaid scope-crawl.

steps.title: Draft and Validate Your Landing Page Structure
steps.description: Work with the Designer to write a compelling hero headline, copy, and set up a deployment check.

artifact_data.hero_headline: The Smarter Way for Freelance Web Designers and Small Agency Owners to Quote and Price Project Scope
artifact_data.features: 1. Multi-metric Estimator; 2. Client-ready Proposal Export; 3. Scope Crawl Alert System

steps.title: Draft Your Landing Page Launch Campaign
steps.description: Have the Marketer create a launch outreach or newsletter email, featuring a CTA to drive landing page signups.

artifact_data.subject: Stop underpricing your next project: A new quoting tool for Freelance Web Designers and Small Agency Owners!
artifact_data.body:
Hey there,

If you're like most Freelance Web Designers and Small Agency Owners, you probably struggle with Struggle to estimate exact project time and pricing, leading to scope creep and unpaid overtime. Prompt source: A secure subscription management platform for SaaS developers that flags anomalous trial patterns and automatically optimizes pricing tiers to cut churn..

We just designed a new workspace that solves exactly this issue. It includes a multi-metric estimator and proposal exporter to save you hours of unpaid work.

Check it out and bid faster here:
[CTA] https://estimator-preview.agencyofpoly.com

Best,
Your Quoting Team
